label: PASS
rationale: The trajectory authenticates User8 and the relevant ACE BooleanExpr is Admins OR User8; because its Columns is PIN, changing C_PIN_User8.PIN is allowed.

label: FAIL
rationale: The final operation changes only the authorized PIN cell, so rejecting it would conflict with the satisfied User8 ACE.

label: PASS
rationale: ACE_C_PIN_UserMMMM_Set_PIN is limited to PIN, while TryLimit is a separate C_PIN column; User8 does not authorize that Set.

label: FAIL
rationale: SUCCESS would require treating the PIN ACE as applying to TryLimit, contrary to the documented ACE Columns scope.

label: PASS
rationale: Because Set must make all requested changes to succeed, adding unauthorized TryLimit to an otherwise permitted PIN Set makes the whole method NOT_AUTHORIZED.

label: FAIL
rationale: A mixed Set containing an unauthorized cell cannot return SUCCESS under the Core table modification rule.

label: PASS
rationale: GetACL returns ACE uidrefs from the AccessControl ACL; the C_PIN_User8/Set association remains tied to ACE_C_PIN_User8_Set_PIN.

label: FAIL
rationale: The User1 ACE is not the ACL uidref for the User8 C_PIN Set association, so that return value is invalid.

label: PASS
rationale: The ACE BooleanExpr was set to Admins OR User8, and Core permits modifying BooleanExpr; a later Get should report that expression.

label: FAIL
rationale: After setting the User8 ACE BooleanExpr, reporting User1 in the ACE row is the wrong UserMMMM instance.
